title.en: Scanning and copying documents on multifunction devices

group-parts.group: Scanning and copying documents on multifunction devices
group-parts.name: overview

prose.en: As MFDs residing on networks are often capable of sending scanned documents across networks they are connected to, personnel should be aware that if they scan documents at a level higher than the sensitivity or classification of the network it will cause a data spill. In addition, MFDs used to copy documents above the sensitivity or classification of the network may cause a localised data spill if copies are retained on non-volatile memory within the devices.
